reasoning_top2: Descriptive association in a large nationally representative sample (NSHAP, n=1502) — remarriage as a structural predictor of sexual activity is the kind of effect that typically replicates.
Reported SE=.01 with b=-1.73 is implausibly small (z≈-173), suggesting a transcription error; direction is plausible but the magnitude OR=.18 may be inflated.
